snapshot_binding.note: Authored narrative sequencing (per production's own Snapshot_Mapping_Manifest.md 'Story annotations' section: 'authored narrative copy... not a derivable aggregate of raw operational data'), not production-backed. revenue_at_risk/operational_health_score figures roll up the pre-NR04 planner-narrative fixtures. See docs/SNAPSHOT_CONSUMPTION_NOTES.md.

v1a_alignment.story: Executive Signal -> Commitment -> Demand -> Shortage -> Recommendation -> Decision -> Evidence -> Operational Relationships -> Timeline -> Source Records
v1a_alignment.truth_rule: Timeline progression reveals depth in the same investigation; it must not switch demo stories or imply unimplemented workflows.

records.label: Baseline
records.narrative: NorthRiver operating baseline before the Horizon CPP-1000 shortage becomes an executive signal.

records.label: Supply pressure detected
records.narrative: The Horizon CPP-1000 commitment becomes critical as shortage coverage exposes revenue at risk.

records.label: Recommendation generated
records.narrative: The flagship Horizon recommendation is generated from governed shortage evidence. Decision action remains honestly gated in the lab.

records.label: Operational relationships exposed
records.narrative: The Horizon investigation resolves into the CPP-1000 operational chain, ending in the customer escalation source record.
